import Card from '@mui/material/Card' import CardActions from '@mui/material/CardActions' import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent' import CardMedia from '@mui/material/CardMedia' import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography' import Button from '@mui/material/Button' import React from 'react' import { makeStyles } from '@material-ui/core/styles' import project1 from './assets/21.jpg' const useStyles = makeStyles((theme) => ({ experience: { color: 'white', width: '500px', height: '200px', }, expdes: { display: 'block', }, company: { display: 'block', // textTransform: 'uppercase' }, duration: { // display: 'inline-block' }, projectsdiv: { padding: '20px 40px', overflow: 'scroll', }, projects: { height: '250px', width: '200px', }, })) const Projects = () => { const projects = [] const classes = useStyles() return (
Experience
Web Developer Intern At Jindal Trading Corperation {' '} August 2022 to April 2023
  • Built an e-commerce website for the company
  • Learnt ReactJS
Software Engineer Full-time At One Convergence Devices Pvt Ltd {' '} August 2022 to April 2023
  • Worked in DKube an MLOps platform using ReactJS
  • Hands-on experince in Kubernetes, Docker
Projects

) } export default Projects
